labels.notes: Toni Anthony 3:23 — SHOULD BE MERGED with df5acc1a (4:12 tail). The two sessions are one continuous insulin-titration conversation: a30cd034 ends mid-sentence ('I'm going to add to that 15 units of truvy') with a brief Mandarin utterance ('在哪儿？'), then df5acc1a starts mid-sentence ('So dropi works within like ten minutes') continuing the same insulin-education thread. Encounter-detection LLM said complete=True at 20:12:22 wc=6095, mistaking a wrap-up-style 'we're going to do this' phrase for an encounter end. df5acc1a starts 11 seconds before a30cd034's recorded end (negative gap = flush-on-stop / forced-split signature, same as Kaden phantom). MANUAL MERGE FAILED with 'Session not found: a30cd034-4ab7-430b-aa17-66228bbfab24' because both sessions live only on Room 2's local archive — merge_sessions() in local_archive.rs:1495 checks LOCAL FS only and the user attempted the merge from a different machine.
